title: Add KelasWeb to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [KelasWeb](https://arekgresik.my.id/) to learn
- KelasWeb is an Indonesian educational platform for beginners to learn web development using AI. It provides guided instruction to help users master core web skills.

Fixes #10993

gist.headline: KelasWeb joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: KelasWeb just sprouted in our community showcase! It's a fantastic Indonesian educational platform helping beginners master web development with AI.
gist.summary: Added KelasWeb, an Indonesian educational platform for learning web development using AI, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover KelasWeb in the community directory and use it to learn core web development skills with AI guidance.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee in a greenhouse setting, representing the GREENHOUSE.md addition, reading or learning about web development. A retro monitor showing web code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, watering a glowing code-plant inside a lush digital greenhouse. A retro computer monitor nearby displays a web page layout. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
